title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 今日（2026-03-19）の note deck を fresh で回すなら、期待値は次です。 - 最有力: `delivery/variant-matrix.json` は `status: "READY_FOR_SELECTION"`、`structured_native: "PASS"`、`nanobanana_adaptive: "PASS"`（直近 `...escalated-7` がこの形）。 - 次点: `structured_native: "PASS"` + `nanobanana_adaptive: "PREVIEW_ONLY"`（Google Slides の `output.pptx` export が size limit のとき）。 - 失敗系: adaptive が `FAIL` なら matrix 全体は `status: "FAIL"`。 成功系（`READY_FOR_SELECTION`）で揃うべき receipt 名: - `delivery/variant-matrix.json` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/inspection-report.json` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/repair-log.json` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pptx` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/output.pdf` - `delivery/variants/structured-native/preview-attempt-0/`（ディレクトリ） adaptive が `PASS` のとき追加で期待する receipt 名: - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/progress.json` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/google-slides-result.json`（fallback時） - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/inspection-report.json` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/repair-log.json` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/delivery-gate.json` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/output.pptx` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/output.pdf` - `delivery/variants/nanobanana-adaptive/preview-attempt-0/` adaptive が size-limit で `PREVIEW_ONLY` のとき: - 上記から `output.pptx` は欠けうる - ただし `output.pdf` + `preview-attempt-0/` + `inspection-report.json` + `delivery-gate.json` は残る想定 - `delivery-gate.json` は `status: "PREVIEW_ONLY"`、`checks.pptx_export_status: "size_limit_exceeded"` が目印
